nodes.label: Tests for the daemon-backed server resolution in the CLI.  Under the daemon mode
Keep daemon-reuse tests independent of the developer's real config.
Subprocess stub returned by a patched ``Popen``.      :param args: Command line
Patch ``_ensure_host_daemon``'s side effects to a tmp pidfile + stub Popen.
Write a daemon registry JSON fixture.      :param tmp_path: Temp directory conta
A remote URL spawns the daemon with ``--server <url>`` and records it.      The
``server_url=None`` spawns the daemon with ``--local`` and marks it.      The pi
The local daemon inherits the runtime data-dir + DB URI vars.      In local mode
Local daemon env carries credentials needed by its Omnigent server.      The dae
CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH reaches the local daemon env.      LiteLLM proxies
Remote daemon env remains allowlisted and does not carry LLM keys.
A live daemon for the same target is reused — no respawn.
Starting target B through the CLI does not terminate target A.      Regression t
A live local daemon already serving the requested loopback URL is reused.      T
A live background daemon with matching config + online host is reused.      The
A background daemon with a stale host id is torn down + respawned.      The nati
A background daemon spawned under a different config is torn down + respawned.
A live-but-offline background daemon (zombie) is torn down + respawned.      The
A freshly-spawned daemon still connecting is reused, not torn down.      Guards
Build a local daemon record suitable for host-online probing.      :returns: A r
The probe returns ``True`` only on a 200 with ``status == "online"``.
A host the server reports as offline is not online.
A failed request (status 0) means the host is not reachable/online.
Without a known host id there is nothing to probe.
When the host is already online, recovery returns without polling.
A persistently-offline host fails recovery within the grace window.
A config-drift respawn stops with a clean re-run prompt, not a continue.      Wh
A plain reuse / heal does NOT exit — the command continues normally.
Foreground ``host`` is visible to status while it runs.
Foreground ``host`` refuses a second live daemon for one server.
Stub the local-mode foreground ``host`` dependencies.      :param monkeypatch: P
Answering yes at the exit prompt stops the detached local server.
Answering no at the exit prompt leaves the server running.
Aborting the prompt (EOF / second Ctrl-C) leaves the server running.      ``clic
A Ctrl-C stop (KeyboardInterrupt) still reaches the exit prompt.
No prompt fires when no healthy local server is found at exit.
Reusing a server we didn't spawn (e.g. ``omnigent server``) skips the prompt.
A connection failure (SystemExit) does not prompt over the error.
Remote-mode ``host`` never probes for or prompts about a local server.
``host status --json`` includes daemon, host, runner, and sessions.
Wide ``host status`` tables preserve full session and runner ids.
``host sessions`` is not a separate inspection surface.
``connect stop`` posts stop_session before terminating the daemon.
``connect stop --daemon-only`` terminates without HTTP session calls.
``connect stop-session`` posts stop events only for requested ids.
A remote URL ensures a daemon for it and returns the normalized URL.
No URL ensures a ``--local`` daemon and returns the discovered URL.      The CLI
A schemeless ``--server`` URL is defaulted to https before expansion.      Cover
Discovery returns as soon as the local server answers health.
If the daemon exits before its server is ready, fail loud (not hang).
Build a ``run_claude_native`` stub that records its kwargs.      :param captured
Patch ``run_chat`` to record kwargs and return the capture dict.      :param mon
``run`` uses ``server`` from config when ``--server`` is omitted.      Regressio
An explicit ``--server`` wins over the configured default.
Build a real httpx.Response shaped like the Apps edge answer.      :param status
Wire the pre-flight's collaborators for one scripted run.      :param monkeypatc
An unauthenticated Databricks-fronted server triggers the login flow.      Witho
Headless invocations get the exact login command, not a browser.
A 200 probe (valid creds / header mode) never invokes login.
``non_interactive=True`` fails with the login hint even on a TTY.      Without t
Stub the foreground-host plumbing and capture connect targets.      Covers both
Replace the auth pre-flight with a capturing no-op.      :param monkeypatch: Pyt
Remote ``host`` runs the sign-in pre-flight, then connects.
``omnigent host <url> --non-interactive`` parses the flag with the shorthand.
Local-mode ``host ""`` never runs the remote sign-in pre-flight.
Un-authed Databricks ``host`` (no TTY) fails with the login hint, never connecti
A 200 probe (valid creds / header mode) connects without a login flow.
Stand in for ``_workspace_api_server_url`` with a visible transform.      :param
Build a ``_workspace_api_server_url`` stub that records its input.      :param s
An explicit ``--server`` workspace URL is expanded to its API mount.      Regres
The configured ``server`` default is expanded just like ``--server``.
The local-server fallback returns a concrete URL without expansion.      The bac
``host`` subcommands expand a bare ``--server`` workspace URL.      The daemon i
With no ``--server``, the configured default is read and expanded.
No CLI value and no configured default stays local (``None``).
``host`` subcommands accept a schemeless ``/omnigent`` workspace URL.      The i
Without ``--server``, resume forwards ``None`` and never probes.
``omnigent resume --server <ws>/omnigent`` (no scheme) is defaulted to https.
